negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_0aef6f94-b02a-4c29-b99f-06fcd48ac0a0
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out through the windshield onto a sunny day in a suburban area. The scene features a large tree, the tallest in the video, with sprawling branches dominating the center of the frame, casting dappled shadows on the road below. To the right, a multi-story beige building, likely an apartment complex or office building, is surrounded by more trees and greenery. Several parked cars line the street, and a yellow traffic sign is visible on the left side of the road. The sky is clear and blue, enhancing the brightness of the scene. As the video progresses, a white car drives past on the right side of the road, moving from left to right across the frame. The ego vehicle makes a left turn and then accelerates. The tree continues to sway slightly in the breeze, and the sun creates a lens flare effect on the windshield. The overall scene remains calm and serene, with more vehicles and a few pedestrians entering the camera view. By the end of the video, the same tranquil suburban setting is captured, with the ego car having passed further down the road, and the tree still swaying gently in the breeze under the bright sunlight. The camera view stays static throughout the video.
